description_long: This bungalow features a modern, blocky design with a flat roof and a prominent golden-yellow arch structure on top. The exterior walls are primarily red brick with large vertical wooden columns at the corners, and the facade is accented by glass window panels and metallic frames. The front entrance is sheltered by a small overhang and is flanked by lush green hedges and a paved walkway. The roof includes two visible HVAC units and a central skylight, while the landscaping is neatly bordered by a gray stone sidewalk and grass. The windows are arranged in vertical strips, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall appearance is contemporary, with a mix of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with red brick walls, large glass windows, wooden columns, and a golden arch on the roof, surrounded by hedges and a paved sidewalk.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a small overhang, vertical glass window panels, and prominent wooden columns, bordered by hedges and a sidewalk.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the red brick wall, three tall windows, and a metallic window frame, with hedges and sidewalk continuing along the side.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a symmetrical arrangement of windows and the golden arch structure on the roof, with a clear view of the landscaping and sidewalk.
description_view_3: This side view features the main entrance steps, overhang, and a clear view of the wooden columns and glass window panels, with landscaping wrapping around the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped vertical window panels
